output_payload.governance_tier: Tier 2 — Supervised Autonomous (human review before action; GPAI obligations if using foundation model)

applicable_obligations.requirement: Ensure all staff deploying or using the agent have adequate AI literacy (Art 4). Verify scope against consolidated text.

applicable_obligations.status: IN FORCE target ~2 Aug 2026 (verify — Omnibus may have adjusted; check Official Journal)
applicable_obligations.requirement: Disclose to users that they are interacting with an AI system (chatbot/agent). Art 50§1. Verify exact scope and any exceptions against consolidated text.

Provider of GPAI model must: maintain technical documentation; make training data summary available; implement copyright policy; publish model card or register with EU AI Office. Verify against current GPAI Code of Practice and Art 53 text.
Comply with harmonised standards or the GPAI Code of Practice (Art 54). Verify current Code of Practice status with EU AI Office.

output_payload.autonomy_oversight_verdict: MODERATE — Supervised autonomous agent. Human review before action is appropriate. Document oversight procedures.
output_payload.highrisk_interaction: No downstream high-risk Annex III financial-services use case declared. If use case changes, re-assess.
output_payload.recommendation: RUN aig-gpai-agentic chain to map GPAI obligations (Arts 53-54, in force 2 Aug 2025). Register model with EU AI Office and comply with GPAI Code of Practice.
output_payload.in_force_status: GPAI obligations (Arts 53-55) IN FORCE since 2 Aug 2025. AI literacy (Art 4) IN FORCE since 2 Feb 2025. Verify GPAI Code of Practice version against EU AI Office. Systemic-risk threshold (10^25 FLOP) — verify against current Art 55 text.
output_payload.note: EDUCATIONAL — Decision-support draft. Outputs are not legal determinations. Verify all Art references against EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689) consolidated text at https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2024/1689/oj and current GPAI Code of Practice at EU AI Office.
